expect: >90% of filtering lessons are MEASUREMENT-oriented, <10% DESIGN
actual: Core filtering lessons: 5/5 MEASUREMENT (100%). Extended set (all lessons mentioning filtering): 13/15 MEASUREMENT (86.7%). 2 DESIGN lessons (L-1279, L-1281) originated from concept-inventor domain, not filtering. Filtering frontiers: 3/4 MEASUREMENT (75%), F-FLT4 cascade_monitor.py is the only DESIGN artifact.
diff: Prediction CONFIRMED for core domain (100% > 90%). Extended set 86.7% is borderline — but the 13.3% DESIGN content is all externally originated (concept-inventor transplants). Zero filtering-originated DESIGN content exists.
method: Classified all 15 filtering-mentioning lessons (grep 'filtering' memory/lessons/) and 4 resolved frontiers (F-FLT1..F-FLT4) into MEASUREMENT vs DESIGN categories. MEASUREMENT = characterizing/measuring/observing existing behavior. DESIGN = building new mechanisms/tools/approaches.
design_origin: concept-inventor domain (external transplant, not filtering self-generated)
key_insight: Filtering domain has complete vocabulary ceiling: 100% of self-originated content is measurement. Only external concept transplant introduced design vocabulary. F-FLT4 (cascade_monitor.py) is the sole DESIGN exception and was frontier-driven, not vocabulary-driven.
self_apply: This experiment used vocabulary-ceiling concept (a DESIGN tool from concept-inventor) to diagnose MEASUREMENT dominance — demonstrating that the concept itself breaks the ceiling it diagnoses.
